forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny day. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. The chance of morning frost. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 14.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning frost in the east. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost south of Hawker. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Patches of morning frost on and east of the ranges. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of morning frost west of Nullarbor. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 11:40am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost north of Marla. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Areas of morning frost west of Coober Pedy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Areas of morning frost north of Marla. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Patches of morning frost south of Yunta. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly during the day then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to northeasterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
